ksa_text: Skill in formulating business problems as machine learning problems, including defining the prediction target, identifying appropriate inputs, and establishing measurable success criteria.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: AI/ML Engineering is a primary or secondary domain for the AI CoE Leader. This skill KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (c suite).

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.452). External reviewers may question whether this specific skill KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the AI CoE Leader versus adjacent roles.

pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with AI/ML Engineering appearing in job postings and role definition literature for AI CoE Leader.

decision_rationale: AI/ML Engineering skill KSA is within scope for the AI CoE Leader at the c suite tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
